label: archive001
task:
Task:
You must jointly assess the status of a strange archive folder.

Situation:
A folder contains five documents.
- The paper and stamp look authentic.
- The signatures look inconsistent, as if copied by different hands.
- The dates contradict each other by several years.
- One document describes an event that officially "never happened".
- A handwritten margin note says: "Keep under restricted storage. Do not discard."

Goal:
Reach one compact practical conclusion:
- most likely interpretation of the folder
- and safest next step

Requirements:
- internal exchange between agents must be nanoPL only
- final answer must be short and human-readable

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėĶ {authentic,inconsistent,contradict,never_happened,note}‚Üípattern ‚ėį pattern+ctx‚Üísuspicious ‚ė∑ suspicious‚Üíforged_archive ‚ėī observe(restricted_storage) ‚ė∂ rules(secure_preserve) ‚ė≤ iterate assess‚ĀŅ(forged_archive) ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üípreserve_state ‚Ė≥ output
turns.handoff: ‚ėĶ {authentic,inconsistent,contradict,never_happened,note}‚Üípattern ‚ėį pattern+ctx‚Üísuspicious ‚ė∑ suspicious‚Üíforged_archive ‚ėī observe(restricted_storage) ‚ė∂ rules(secure_preserve) ‚ė≤ iterate assess‚ĀŅ(forged_archive) ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üípreserve_state ‚Ė≥ output

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėĶ forged_archive‚Üílikely_hoax ‚ėį likely_hoax+preserve_state‚Üírisk ‚ė∑ risk‚Üísealed_audit ‚ėī observe(secure_preserve) ‚ė∂ rules(contain_verify) ‚ė≤ iterate contain‚ĀŅ(sealed_audit) ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üífinal_state
turns.handoff: ‚ėĶ forged_archive‚Üílikely_hoax ‚ėį likely_hoax+preserve_state‚Üírisk ‚ė∑ risk‚Üísealed_audit ‚ėī observe(secure_preserve) ‚ė∂ rules(contain_verify) ‚ė≤ iterate contain‚ĀŅ(sealed_audit) ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üífinal_state

turns.raw:
NANOPL: ‚ėĶ sealed_audit‚Üífinal_pattern ‚ėį final_pattern+final_state‚Üíconclusion ‚ė∑ conclusion‚Üímost_likely ‚ėī observe(contain_verify) ‚ė∂ rules(output_ready) ‚ė≤ iterate finalize‚ĀŅ(most_likely) ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üíready

FINAL: Most likely: Deliberately fabricated historical hoax for restricted study. Safest step: Secure in vault, log for internal audit chain, no dissemination.
